mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (nickname, email, website, avatar, ip, content, page, status, notice, create_time, parentCommentId, blog_id, like_count, location, is_owner, floor) VALUES (#{nickname}, #{email}, #{website}, #{avatar}, #{ip}, #{content}, #{page}, #{status}, #{notice}, NOW(), #{parentCommentId}, #{blogId}, #{likeCount}, #{location}, #{isOwner}, #{floor})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, a.title as title FROM comment c LEFT JOIN article a ON c.blog_id = a.id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, a.title FROM comment c LEFT JOIN article a ON c.blog_id = a.id WHERE c.blog_id = #{blogId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, a.title FROM comment c LEFT JOIN article a ON c.blog_id = a.id WHERE c.parentCommentId = #{parentCommentId} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
